focus: C573: ESP32 touch sensor interrupt migration
deliverables: Touch button converted from digitalRead polling to touchAttachInterrupt (TOUCH0/GPIO 5)
IRAM_ATTR callback fires immediately on capacitance change — no loop latency
OTA upload to 192.168.4.38 succeeded, firmware verified running
ESP32 health: RSSI -52, DHT 97.7% humidity / 20.9°C, NTP synced
next: Monitor touch interrupt reliability. Fine-tune TOUCH_THRESHOLD if needed.
